# Emerald Masonry LLC

> Non-union, family-owned commercial masonry contractor serving Chicagoland with 40+ years of experience. Licensed, bonded, and insured in Illinois.

Emerald Masonry LLC provides professional masonry restoration and repair services for commercial properties, HOAs, churches, property managers, and insurance companies across the greater Chicago area. The company is based in Palos Heights, IL and serves all of Chicagoland. Minimum project size is $5,000. Free on-site estimates provided for all qualifying projects.

## Contact

- Phone: (708) 288-1696
- Email: emeraldmasonryil@gmail.com
- Address: 7156 W. 126th St. Suite 136, Palos Heights, IL 60464
- Website: https://emeraldmasonryil.com
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/people/Emerald-Masonry-LLC/61577959298549/
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/emeraldmasonryil/

## Services

- **Tuckpointing & Repointing**: Complete mortar joint removal and replacement. The single most important maintenance task for any brick building in Chicago's freeze-thaw climate. We grind out failing mortar fully — no skim coats, no surface patches.
- **Brick Repair & Replacement**: Spalled, cracked, and damaged brick restoration. We source matching salvage and new brick to maintain the original appearance of the structure.
- **Chimney Repair & Rebuilds**: Crown repair, flashing replacement, lintel work, and full chimney rebuilds. Chimney masonry is among the most failure-prone on any structure due to top and side exposure.
- **Masonry Restoration & Façade Repair**: Full façade restoration for commercial buildings, churches, schools, and institutions. Parapet wall repair, lintel replacement, stone repointing.
- **Efflorescence Removal & Waterproofing**: Mineral deposit removal and surface sealing to stop water infiltration and prevent further staining.
- **Lintel Repair & Replacement**: Steel and stone lintel repair over windows and doors — a structural element often overlooked until failure is visible.
- **Commercial Masonry**: Large-scale commercial contracts. Multi-building portfolio management. Preferred vendor for property management companies and HOA boards.
- **Insurance Restoration**: Storm, hail, and freeze-thaw damage documentation and repair. We work directly with insurance carriers, TPAs, and adjusters.

## Who We Work With

- Property management companies managing commercial and multi-unit residential portfolios
- HOA boards overseeing shared masonry structures
- Churches, schools, and institutional property owners
- Commercial building owners and investors
- Insurance carriers and TPAs handling masonry damage claims
- General contractors requiring masonry subcontractor

## Why Emerald Masonry LLC

- 40+ years of combined Chicagoland masonry experience
- Non-union, family-owned — no union markups passed to clients
- Licensed, bonded, and insured in the state of Illinois
- Commercial and institutional focus — not a residential patch crew
- Free on-site estimates for all qualifying projects (minimum $5,000)
- Same-business-day response to estimate requests
- Works directly with insurance carriers and adjusters on claims
- Provides written scopes, before-and-after photo documentation, and certificates of completion
- Phased project scheduling available for large buildings across multiple budget cycles

## Service Area

Emerald Masonry LLC serves all of Chicagoland including:

**Counties**: Cook County, DuPage County, Lake County, Will County, Kane County, McHenry County

**Cities and Suburbs**: Chicago, Orland Park, Tinley Park, Frankfort, Mokena, New Lenox, Plainfield, Bolingbrook, Joliet, Lockport, Romeoville, Naperville, Downers Grove, Westmont, Burr Ridge, La Grange, Oak Lawn, Lemont, Wheaton, Homer Glen, Palos Heights, Palos Hills, Worth, Blue Island, Calumet City, Harvey, Dolton, Lansing, Matteson, Park Forest, Richton Park, Olympia Fields, Flossmoor, Homewood, Hazel Crest, Markham, Midlothian, Oak Forest, Alsip, Bridgeview, Chicago Ridge, Evergreen Park, Bedford Park, and surrounding areas. Also serves northwest Indiana commercial clients.
